description: One reviewer's lens on a role's draft. Both arrays default to empty — common outcome is `corrections: []`, no rules.

corrections.description: Single-lens critiques on the writer's draft.

verdict.description: fix = existing action has a problem; missing = a needed action is absent; remove = action is out of scope or duplicative.

action_id.description: Required for fix and remove — the action's id from the writer's draft.

task_id.description: Required for missing — the task id from the iteration plan that the new action should belong under.

correction.description: Concise prose (1–3 sentences) stating the issue and (where it applies) the fix.

rules.description: Rule proposals raised by this reviewer. Use sparingly.

examples.title: Your lens has citable breaks to flag

corrections.correction: Add will-change: transform on .cloud so drift animation stays smooth.
Add a prefers-reduced-motion media query that disables tree growth and cloud drift.

rules.proposal: Every CSS animation block is wrapped in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference).
alternatives: All animations gated by a single :root custom property; toggle from one place.

examples.title: Your lens has nothing to flag (the common case)
